## [Phase 1] Planning — Design & Strategy

This issue was automatically created by the workflow.

### Related Initiative
- **Main Initiative Issue**: {{MAIN_ISSUE_URL}}
- **Knowledge Base**: [{{KB_NAME}}]({{KB_URL}})

### Objective

Define the approach, architecture decisions, and implementation plan based on Phase 0 findings.

### Tasks

#### 1. Solution Design
- [ ] Define high-level architecture
- [ ] Choose technologies and frameworks (if applicable)
- [ ] Design data model or schema changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Define API contracts or interfaces (if applicable)

#### 2. Implementation Plan
- [ ] Break work into actionable tasks
- [ ] Define task dependencies and ordering
- [ ] Estimate effort and identify parallelization opportunities
- [ ] Define acceptance criteria for each task

#### 3. Test Strategy
- [ ] Define testing approach (unit, integration, E2E)
- [ ] Identify critical paths to test
- [ ] Define test data requirements

#### 4. Documentation
- [ ] Document architecture decisions (ADRs)
- [ ] Create technical design document
- [ ] Update project documentation as needed

### Expected Deliverables

1. **Technical Design Document** — Architecture and design decisions
2. **Implementation Plan** — Ordered list of tasks with dependencies
3. **Test Strategy** — Testing approach and coverage goals

### Guidelines

- Follow existing project conventions documented in `copilot-instructions.md`
- Keep decisions simple (KISS) and implement only what is needed (YAGNI)
- Document rationale for all design choices
